verses.1: Rejoice in the LORD, you righteous!
verses.2: Give thanks to the LORD with the lyre.
verses.3: Sing to him a new song.
verses.4: For the LORD’s word is right.
verses.6: By the LORD’s word, the heavens were made:
verses.7: He gathers the waters of the sea together as a heap.
verses.8: Let all the earth fear the LORD.
verses.9: For he spoke, and it was done.
verses.10: The LORD brings the counsel of the nations to nothing.
verses.11: The counsel of the LORD stands fast forever,
verses.12: Blessed is the nation whose God is the LORD,
verses.14: From the place of his habitation he looks out on all the inhabitants of the earth,
verses.15: he who fashions all of their hearts;
verses.16: There is no king saved by the multitude of an army.
verses.17: A horse is a vain thing for safety,
verses.18: Behold, the LORD’s eye is on those who fear him,
verses.19: to deliver their soul from death,
verses.20: Our soul has waited for the LORD.
verses.21: For our heart rejoices in him,
verses.22: Let your loving kindness be on us, LORD,
